## SE gate checklist (feature branches only — delete section for chores/hotfixes)

- [ ] Phase 5 gate PASS report committed to this branch (`specs/features/.../gate-reports/gate-5-pass.md`)
- [ ] Phase 6 V&V closure committed to this branch (`gate-6-pass.md`)
- [ ] Deployment on sietchtabr performed **from this branch** before opening this PR
- [ ] CLAUDE.md updated to close the feature (if applicable)
